name: long-running-harness
description: Multi-agent sprint orchestration harness for long-running application development.

interface.longDescription: Runs an Anthropic-style application harness with 6 agents: initializer, planner, generator, evaluator, coordinator, and releaser. The evaluator handles testing, code review, and grading in one pass. Explicit sprint strategy, quantified QA, and a completion ledger. Domain-agnostic — works for any project type.
defaultPrompt: Build an app using the harness.
Review whether this harness really followed the sprint plan.
Run continuous multi-agent app delivery until done.
